steps.title: Identify increasing or decreasing
steps.content: Scan from left to right across the graph. As $x$ increases, $y$ increases. The function is increasing. This eliminates A (decreasing exponential) and C (decreasing linear).

steps.title: Identify exponential or linear shape
steps.content:
The graph is curved, not straight. The rate of increase accelerates: the $y$-values rise slowly for negative $x$, then more rapidly as $x$ approaches and passes zero.

This accelerating growth is the signature of exponential functions, while linear functions have constant slope and produce straight lines.

That confirms B is correct.
